summary: Iteration 21: Calibration Routing Fix Verification - All 17 tests PASSED. Verified deterministic routing between login, calibration, onboarding, and advisor with no redirect loops. All frontend files only use backend /api/calibration/status endpoint, fail-open to READY on errors, and have proper [CALIBRATION ROUTING] console logs.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: No direct Supabase REST calls to 'rest/v1/user_operator_profile' in SupabaseAuthContext.js
VERIFIED: No direct Supabase REST calls to 'rest/v1/user_operator_profile' in AuthCallbackSupabase.js
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js only calls backend /api/calibration/status for calibration check
VERIFIED: AuthCallbackSupabase.js only calls backend /api/calibration/status for calibration check
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js has fail-open behavior - calibrationComplete = true on error (line 254, 258)
VERIFIED: AuthCallbackSupabase.js has fail-open behavior - needsCalibration = false on error (line 114, 118)
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js has [CALIBRATION ROUTING] console logs (4 occurrences)
VERIFIED: AuthCallbackSupabase.js has [CALIBRATION ROUTING] console logs (6 occurrences)
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js has [CALIBRATION ROUTING] console log (1 occurrence)
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js redirects READY users from /calibration to /advisor (lines 111-113)
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js allows NEEDS_CALIBRATION users to access /calibration (lines 136-141)
VERIFIED: Calibration check (line 265) runs BEFORE onboarding check (line 272) in SupabaseAuthContext.js
VERIFIED: Backend /api/calibration/status raises HTTPException(500) on errors, not returns 200
VERIFIED: Backend /api/calibration/status returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
VERIFIED: All three frontend JS files compile without syntax errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified all calibration routing fix features. Key verifications: (1) No direct Supabase REST calls in frontend code - frontend uses ONLY /api/calibration/status backend endpoint, (2) Frontend fails-open to READY on any error (network, 500, etc), (3) ProtectedRoute.js redirects calibrated users (READY state) from /calibration to /advisor, (4) Onboarding check runs AFTER calibration check, (5) Backend raises 500 on errors instead of returning 200 with NEEDS_CALIBRATION. Full E2E testing with authenticated user was NOT performed due to lack of valid credentials for andrewrx@hotmail.com.
